problem: Needed more enterprise demos but outbound produced low-quality calls
solution: Built trigger-based account lists and personalized email sequences around compliance events
result: Booked 31 qualified demos in 90 days and improved meeting quality

problem: Relied on referrals and had inconsistent pipeline from manufacturing accounts
solution: Segmented manufacturers by technology stack and launched role-specific outreach
result: Generated 18 sales-qualified opportunities from mid-market manufacturing accounts

problem: Struggled to get enterprise decision makers to engage with cost-reduction offer
solution: Reframed outreach around measurable margin leaks and sent account-specific teardown emails
result: Won 4 enterprise discovery calls in the first month
